title: The Gateway
lines: You approach the jagged, floating tear in reality that hovers behind the pulsating altar like a festering wound in the very fabric of the universe.

It radiates unnatural, impossible colors—hues that should not exist in the human spectrum—that sear your retinas and ignite a primal, existential fear. The humming vibration is a physical weight, a tectonic drone that shakes your very bones and threatens to dissolve your physical form into the void.

You can feel a freezing, primordial wind blowing from the abyss on the other side, carrying the scent of cosmic dust and the dry, rattling whispers of dead stars. This is no earthly gateway; it is a path to the absolute outside.

options.desc: Step blindly through the jagged portal and into the unknown
Turn your back on the abyss and flee toward the surface
